# datadog Provider

Terraform provider for managing Datadog Notebook.

## Example Usage

```terraform
provider "datadog-notebook" {
  api_key = var.datadog_api_key
  app_key = var.datadog_app_key
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Optional

- `api_key` (String, Sensitive) Datadog API key. Can also be set via `DD_API_KEY` environment variable.
- `api_url` (String) Datadog API base URL. Can also be set via `DD_HOST` environment variable. Defaults to `https://api.datadoghq.com`.
- `app_key` (String, Sensitive) Datadog Application key. Can also be set via `DD_APP_KEY` environment variable.
- `validate` (Boolean) Whether to validate credentials on provider initialization. Defaults to `true`.
